fields.paper_left: AI proves Zig is inferior to Rust for production code
fields.paper_right: Claude wrote 4 memory bugs per week and no one reviewed them

narrative_summary: Anthropic's spin that Bun's Zig-to-Rust migration proves AI sufficiency is the same picture as 'unchecked AI slop accumulated so many bugs the team had to flee the language.'
rationale: Candidate 3 is the only one that earns its punchline structurally — the 'same picture' template is a perfect fit because the joke IS about two framings of identical facts, and the contrast between Anthropic's marketing spin and the raw bug-rate reality lands as a genuine reveal rather than a restatement. Every other candidate just slaps the 'this is fine' meme on the story without the template doing any comedic work.
story_title: Zig Creator Calls Spade a Spade, Anthropic Blows Smoke
place: on a space elevator stuck between floors
hat_pair: bucket hat with a tiny aquarium built into the brim
full-face motorcycle helmet with googly eyes stuck on
